name: Chicken Divan
recipeInstructions:
1. Cook broccoli as directed on the package. Drain and arrange in a greased 11.5 x 7.5 x 1.5 baking dish.
2. Place chicken on top of the broccoli.
3. In a pan, cook the cream of chicken soup, mayonnaise, lemon juice, and sherry (if using).
4. Pour the sauce over the chicken.
5. Sprinkle Velveeta cheese on top.
6. Toss bread crumbs with melted butter.
7. Sprinkle the breadcrumbs evenly over the cheese.
8. Bake at 350°F for 30 minutes. Check at 15-20 minutes and cover if browning too quickly.
9. Add more chicken or broccoli, as desired. Enjoy.
